name: Diversity and Inclusion Training
description: Training programs that aim to promote diversity and inclusion in media and advertising, helping to reduce the spread of hate speech and stereotypes.
when_to_apply: regularly, as part of ongoing professional development
example: media outlets providing diversity and inclusion training for their journalists and staff
anti_pattern: ignoring the need for diversity and inclusion training

name: Regulatory Frameworks
description: Establishing and enforcing regulatory frameworks that promote diversity and inclusion in media and advertising, helping to reduce the spread of hate speech and stereotypes.
when_to_apply: in the development of media and advertising policies
example: regulatory bodies establishing guidelines for diversity and inclusion in media and advertising
